'''Tamish''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Thennqora]] hunter who traveled to [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] to hunt [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]. He bagged a Morodin alongside the [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]], [[Cob-caree]].

==Biography==
Tamish, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Thennqora]], was a wealthy businessbeing. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], he traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Varonat/Legends|Varonat]] to hunt [[Morodin/Legends|Morodin]]. Alongside a [[Saffa (species)|Saffa]], [[Cob-caree]], he [[Death/Legends|killed]] a Morodin.<ref name="FC" />

==Personality and traits==
Tamish was a wealthy Thennqora who was bored and looking for excitement, leading to him signing up for a hunting expedition. Despite his wealth, he complained that he had to work for his excitement. Unlike his fellow hunters, Tamish had some experience in hunting, and was able to identify a Morodin slime trail.<ref name="FC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tamish first appeared in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s ''[[First Contact]]'', which was published in [[1994]]'s [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 1]] by [[West End Games]]. ''First Contact'' was subsequently reprinted in ''[[The Best of the Star Wars Adventure Journal, Issues 1-4]]'', ''[[Tales from the Empire]]'', and on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|''Hyperspace'']].
